urdu transliteration text: Dard o alam ka markaze ehsaas bangayi
english translation text: She (Zainab a.s) became the center of the feeling of grief and pain

urdu transliteration text: Be aas qaafele ke liye aas bangayi
english translation text: She (Zainab as) became the hope for a group that had lost hope

urdu transliteration text: Din dhal gaya to shaam e ghareeban ke saath hi
english translation text: As the sun set, and the night turned into shaam e ghareeban

urdu transliteration text:
The daughter of Ali (as) became Hazrate Abbas (as)
Beti Ali (as) ki Hazrat e Abbas (as) bangayi
Darmiyaa(n) laasho(n) ke maqtal me khari hai zainab
english translation text: Zainab is surrounded by dead bodies on the battlefield

urdu transliteration text: Is andhere mein kisse dhoondh rahi hai zainab
english translation text: Who is Zainab looking for in this darkness?

urdu transliteration text: Sabki nazre hai chamakte hue khanjar ki taraf
english translation text: Everyone's eyes are on the dagger that is standing out

urdu transliteration text: Bhai ka khushk gala dekh rahi hai zainab
english translation text: Zainab is looking at the dry neck of her brother

urdu transliteration text: Sheh pe chalte hue khanjar ko bhala kya maalum
english translation text: How is the dagger that will strike Imam Hussain supposed to know

urdu transliteration text: Kis tarha khaak pe ghash khaake giri hai zainab
english translation text: In what manner Zainab fainted and fell to the floor

urdu transliteration text: Haat utha kar kare kis tarha se laasho ko salam
english translation text: How can she (Zainab) lift her hands and send her salutations to the bodies

urdu transliteration text: Haath rassi me hai shaano se bandhi hai Zainab
english translation text: Her hands are tied with ropes and she is tied by the shoulders

urdu transliteration text: Chor kar bhai ko maqtal se ho rukhsat kaise
english translation text: How can she leave her brother alone (in Karbala)

urdu transliteration text: Laash se uthi hai phir uth ke giri hai zainab
english translation text: As Zainab stands up from his body, she keeps collapsing back to the body

urdu transliteration text:
'Navaid' (poet), she left Madina to save the religion
Deen bachane ko jo nikli thi madine se navaid
Bach gaya deen magar kaise luti hai zainab
english translation text: The religion was saved, but in what manner was Zainab persecuted
